channel.title: Soroban-ZK-Std Changelog
channel.description: Updates to Soroban-ZK-Std — a high-performance cryptographic standard library for Stellar Protocol 25 ZK-primitives (BN254, Poseidon2, ElGamal, Pairing).

item.title: feat: BN254 Square Root Algorithm documentation
item.dc:creator: georgegoldman
item.description:
Added BN254_Square_Root_Algorithm.md — mathematical documentation for the BN254 square root implementation in zk-core.

View commit 28004a9

item.title: feat(crypto): complete BN254 arithmetic and ElGamal bridge
item.dc:creator: georgegoldman
item.description:
Closes #9, #12, #17, #20, #21. Major arithmetic milestone for zk-core:

  • BN254 base field (Fq) and scalar field (Fr) arithmetic.
  • Fr subtraction with modular underflow protection.
  • G1Projective Jacobian point addition and doubling.
  • Constant-time g1_scalar_mul using bitwise ct_select — no scalar leakage via timing side-channels.
  • Jacobian → Affine coordinate conversion (to_affine).
  • ElGamalCiphertext API synchronised with shielded-asset-template.
  • 100% passing tests and successful WASM target compilation.

View commit a63a47d

item.title: feat(crypto): constant-time g1_scalar_mul (double-and-add)
item.dc:creator: georgegoldman
item.description:
Closes #12. Implements g1_scalar_mul over BN254 G1:

  • Constant-time double-and-add scanning all 254 scalar bits.
  • ct_select eliminates branching on scalar bits.
  • Edge-case handling for scalar = 0 (identity) and scalar = 1.
  • Test suite: group order identity, multiplicative identity, doubling consistency.

View commit 1a0ddcd

item.title: feat: ElGamal viewing keys and shielded asset template (#5)
item.dc:creator: Miracle656
item.description:
Implements Issue #5. Adds ElGamal viewing-key infrastructure and a complete shielded-asset-template contract demonstrating configurable privacy on Stellar Protocol 25.

View commit 4e3f379

item.title: feat: Poseidon2 sponge construction for BN254 (CAP-0075, Issue #2)
item.dc:creator: Salmatcre8
item.description:
Implements Issue #2. Poseidon2 sponge over BN254 Fr (t=3, rate=2, capacity=1):

  • Calls env.crypto_hazmat().poseidon2_permutation() — one host call per permutation, zero guest-side loop overhead.
  • hash_to_field() compatible with Noir/Circom Poseidon2 constraints.
  • KAT verified against soroban-env-host-25.0.1.

View commit 65feaed

item.title: feat: field element serialization to/from canonical bytes (Issue #18)
item.dc:creator: Miracle656
item.description:
Implements Issue #18.

  • FQ_MODULUS constant (BN254 base field prime p) added to Bn254.
  • fr_to_bytes / fr_from_bytes with strict range check against r.
  • fq_to_bytes / fq_from_bytes with strict range check against p.
  • 13 tests: round-trip identity, boundary values, rejection of inputs ≥ modulus.
  • No heap allocation — fixed [u8; 32] arrays, snarkjs/circom big-endian compatible.

View commit ffbd41a

item.title: feat: constant-time Fermat-based modular inversion (Issue #8)
item.dc:creator: Miracle656
item.description:
Implements Issue #8. Constant-time Fermat-based modular inversion in zk-core, safe for use in WASM environments without variable-time branches.

View commit dbc26d5

item.title: feat: Legendre Symbol checks (Issue #16)
item.dc:creator: Miracle656
item.description:
Implements Issue #16. Legendre Symbol computation over BN254 Fr/Fq, used for quadratic-residue tests (prerequisite for square root).

View commit 31792d6

item.title: feat: G1 Multi-Scalar Multiplication (MSM) for BN254
item.dc:creator: nasihudeen04
item.description:
Implements G1 Multi-Scalar Multiplication (MSM) for BN254 in zk-core. Required for Groth16 and PLONK verifier construction on Soroban.

View commit 10b7df6

item.title: feat(zk-core, zk-soroban): zero-copy U256 ↔ Fr field element mapping (#1)
item.dc:creator: Miracle656
item.description:
Resolves #1. Implements zero-copy conversion between ethnum::U256 and Fr field elements across the workspace:

  • ZkError enum with InvalidFieldElement variant.
  • Fr newtype wrapping ethnum::u256 with private invariant.
  • SafeFrom<u256> trait using constant-time overflowing_sub range check — no heap allocation, no panics.
  • HostConvert trait on Env: fr_from_u256(&self, U256) -> Result<Fr, ZkError>, all paths #[inline(always)] to minimise WASM stack depth.
  • 6 unit tests (zk-core) + 5 integration tests (zk-soroban) covering zero, boundary (r-1), modulus, and u256::MAX.

View commit 673e238

item.title: infra: production-grade CI/CD, WASM size-guards, and ZkEnv trait architecture
item.dc:creator: georgegoldman
item.description:
Establishes the CI/CD foundation for the project:

  • GitHub Actions workflow with cargo test, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo fmt --check, and Miri UB checks.
  • WASM size guards ensuring guest binaries stay within Soroban limits.
  • ZkEnv trait architecture separating host-environment concerns from pure cryptographic logic.
  • deny.toml for license compliance (Apache-2.0 / MIT).

View commit c86d671
